external_repository_check.license_review: Sustainable Use License / Enterprise License model reviewed at repository boundary
external_repository_check.license_impact: No external code copied and no n8n runtime bundled; generated workflow JSON remains a user-owned export artifact.

real_integration_boundary: real_integration means the local workflow export, webhook contract, external automation manifest, and offline validator are implemented and executable. It does not mean an n8n runtime is bundled, imported into, started, or operated by HeiTang KB Forge.
remaining_product_gaps: The desktop Workflow Export settings surface does not yet invoke the exporter.
The Local Core Bridge does not yet expose allowlisted n8n export and validation actions.
Import into a user-owned n8n instance has not been smoke-tested.
No n8n workflow execution result is claimed.
remaining_gap: The n8n export adapter is real and validation passed, but desktop export settings, Core Bridge invocation, user-owned runtime import smoke, later Section 5 items, Full Gate, EXE, and release remain incomplete.
next_required_e2e_step: Process Section 5 item 5.5 MMSkills only; do not start Campaign 4 or bundle n8n.
